title: Unnest on NULL giving an error, even when filtering those rows out
description:
### What happens?

unnest on a column with NULL gives an error, even when filtering out with `where`: `BinderException: Binder Error: UNNEST() can only be applied to lists, structs and NULL`

### To Reproduce

```
import duckdb
import json

duckdb.sql("drop table tbl;")
with open('test2.json', 'w') as fo:
    json.dump({'test': None}, fo)
duckdb.sql("create table tbl as select * from read_json_auto('test2.json');")

duckdb.sql("""
  select unnest(test, recursive:=true) from tbl where test is not null;
""")
```

### OS:

(Arch) Linux, x86_64

### DuckDB Version:

1.2.0

### DuckDB Client:

Python (3.11)

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

Paul van der Linden

### Affiliation:

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, data TEXT, value REAL);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, '[1, 2, 3]', 10.5), (2, NULL, 20.5), (3, '[4, 5]', NULL);
CREATE TABLE another_table AS SELECT id, data FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT json_each.value FROM test_table, json_each(data) WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT json_each.value FROM another_table, json_each(data) WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Unnest on NULL column triggers BinderException error
